text:
Besties, we just unlocked a massive level up! 🍄✨

Say hello to OpenClaw integration! 🦀 We know setting up AI agents used to feel like beating a boss level on hard mode, but we fixed that. With our new update, it’s literally ONE command to auto-install and onboard your own agent. 🌱

It’s giving efficiency. It’s giving growth. It’s giving "I built this while drinking my matcha." 🍵

Whether you’re a Spore or a Nectar contributor, your toolkit just got a whole lot cuter (and more powerful). 

Ready to spawn your own agent?

✨ Link in bio to start building!
